analysis.name: Kaspa
analysis.summary: Kaspa近期因Toccata分叉和Kaskad DeFi上线预期上涨，但今日出现卖新闻回调。基本面扎实，但短期情绪过热，建议观望。

recommendation.invalidation: 跌破0.028美元支撑或分叉/上线延期

catalysts: Toccata分叉升级（提升网络性能）
Kaskad DeFi平台上线（带来生态应用）
近期价格突破51日高点，技术面偏多

latestNews.title: 2 Days to Kaskad Listing: The DeFi Era Kaspa Has Been Waiting For
latestNews.reason: Kaskad上线将带来生态应用和流动性

fundamentals: 公平启动，无预挖、无预售，社区管理
采用GHOSTDAG共识，PoW+BlockDAG，速度快、安全性高
定位为全球金融排序层，支持智能合约和Rollup
最大供应量287亿，当前流通275亿，通胀率低
marketRead: 24小时价格微涨0.02%，但7日涨幅6%，30日涨幅1.37%
DEX流动性3038万美元，交易量20万美元，流动性充足但交易活跃度一般
价格从ATH 0.207美元下跌85%，目前0.03美元附近震荡
risks: 卖新闻回调风险，短期涨幅已部分兑现
分叉或DeFi上线可能延期或不及预期
整体市场情绪偏弱，BTC未突破
DEX交易量较低，价格容易被操纵
watchlist: KAS价格能否站稳0.03美元并突破0.035美元阻力
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko和DexScreener，新闻来自Google News聚合
DEX数据仅代表Solana上的KAS/USDC交易对，非原生KAS链

profile.name: Kaspa
profile.description: Kaspa was fair-launched in November 2021 with no pre-mine, zero pre-sale, and no coin allocations, and is 100 percent community-managed. Kaspa aims to be the world's global sequencer for traditional finance and decentralized crypto markets by utilizing proof-of-work and its BlockDAG consensus protocol, GHOSTDAG. Being the world's fastest proof-of-work network, Kaspa combines five properties: (1) hard money principles, (2) Bitcoin's ethos of security-first fundamentals (boasting a security threshold of fifty percent with significant market hashrate), (3) decentralization from rapid block rate mining, (4) block speeds faster than any PoW or PoS network, and (5) smart contract development through based-rollups without fragmented liquidity. Ushering in all five properties, Kaspa is on track to fulfill Satoshi Nakamoto's vision of a digital medium of exchange while also advancing global layer-one sequencing and minuscule confirmation times dominated by internet latency (cf. chapter 6 of the the paper for some initial benchmarks).
